phase3_findings.description: carriage compare-and-reject enforcement half unpinned; DRAFT-UNREADABLE re-dispatch recovery unpinned

fix_decisions.claim_text: T2 over-fires on read-only-sandbox converged runs (offers even when converged)
fix_decisions.evidence: LOW; deliberate fail-loud over-approximation per the design's stated 'unknown is not zero' bias — over-asking a converged draft is the safe direction, user-gated, bounded (decline->proceed, cap 3). Defensible, not fixed.
